Lines.Text: (Instrumental)
Whipped raw, fresh blood drippin' down the walls
These screams ain't no dreams, they're your curtain call
Lookin' for pleasure, we cannot end the pain here
Come get your fill
Gotta run, gotta crawl back into the night
Baby hush, what's the rush, got you in my sight
Ain't my first time, I'll take it slow, yeah I'm goin' in for the thrill
Now get down on your knees
I'm askin', please (On your knees!)
I'm sinister, under your skin
In lace and leather
Sinister, don't you know who I am
I will make it better
'Cause I'm your mother, master, your maker
You'll find you're feeling love for who hates
Your sin, your soul, misfortune, your pain
For I'll have it all
I will take all I wanna
As they take all they wanna
Don't let me down
Or I'll chew you up and spit you out
No, I'll never surrender
Bow before some pretender
Now watch me go
And claim my throne
Goin' hard, goin' soft, they don't own us here
Free for all, consensual, I thought I'm in the clear
Ready or not, bottom or top, what you got in mind?
A little more, I'll give you more, 'cause the choice is mine
Don't care for drones who all diss me
I'm a B with an itch to scratch so don't mess with me
Lookin' to squeal under my heel? Go on twist and turn
I don't hear no safeword, honey
Put down that magazine
All eyes on me (Obey your queen!)
I'm sinister, under your skin
In lace and leather
Sinister, don't you know who I am
I will make it better
'Cause you're the sinner, I am your savior
You're wrapped up and you're locked in the chains
Your faith, your freedom, fortune, your fame
For I am it all
I am her all!
Here on my own, atop this terrible throne
I reach for the stars, why are they oh so far?
And so I climb, and leave what's left here behind
'Til someday I find
What I want, all I want, I want, I want
I think you're done
(Instrumental)
